home.title: My Timezones
home.subtitle: Manage and compare your team's timezones with style

dialog.addDescription: Track time and working hours for a new location
dialog.searchPlaceholder: Search for a city or country

guide.title: How to use TimeSync
guide.intro: This guide explains how to add and manage timezone cards, and how the free vs premium limits work.
guide.addDescription: Click 'Add Timezone' and search for a city. Set working hours and a label, then save to add it to your list.
guide.editDescription: Use the edit button on a timezone card to change details, or delete it to remove it from your list.
guide.premiumDescription: On the free plan you can save up to 3 timezones. To save more, upgrade to Premium using the upgrade panel.
guide.tip1: Use meaningful labels for team members or offices.
guide.tip2: Keep working hours accurate so meeting suggestions are useful.
guide.tip3: Compare multiple timezones to find optimal meeting windows

help.title: Help & FAQs
help.description: Find answers to common questions or contact our support team
help.q1: How do I add a timezone?
help.a1: Click the 'Add Timezone' button on the home page. Search for your desired city or timezone, and click 'Add'. Free users can add up to 3 timezones, while Premium users have unlimited timezones.
help.q2: How do I upgrade to Premium?
help.a2: Click on your profile avatar in the top right corner, then select 'Account'. In the account modal, click 'Upgrade to Premium' button. You'll be redirected to our secure payment page.
help.q3: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
help.a3: Free users can add up to 3 timezones. Premium users get unlimited timezones, priority support, and early access to new features.
help.q4: How do I delete a timezone?
help.a4: On each timezone card, click the trash icon in the top right corner, then confirm the deletion.
help.a5: Yes! Click on your profile avatar, select 'Logout', then on the login page click 'Forgot Password' to reset it.
help.q6: How do I cancel my Premium subscription?
help.a6: Go to your Account settings by clicking your profile avatar, then click 'Cancel Subscription'. You'll retain Premium access until the end of your billing period.
help.a7: TimeSync displays times in 24-hour format with AM/PM indicators. The interface automatically adapts to your system's locale settings.
help.a8: Yes! We use industry-standard encryption for all data transmission and storage. Your timezone preferences are securely stored and only accessible to you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, and timezone preferences. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our service.
privacy.section2Intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.section2Item1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacy.section2Item2: Process transactions and send related information
privacy.section2Item3: Send technical notices and support messages
privacy.section2Item4: Respond to your comments and questions
privacy.section2Item5: Monitor and analyze trends and usage
privacy.section3Content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy. We may share information with service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing and analytics.
privacy.section4Content: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction. All data transmission is encrypted using SSL/TLS protocols.
privacy.section5Content: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
privacy.section6Content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our service and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or indicate when a cookie is being sent.
privacy.section7Item4: Object to processing of your information
privacy.section7Item5: Export your data in a portable format
privacy.section8Content: Our service is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy.section9Content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date.
privacy.section10Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

premium.availableTimezones: available timezones on the free plan.
